hypothesis: Combining Keltner Channel breakout with Vortex and Volume Oscillator filters creates a robust entry signal that avoids false breakouts during low volatility or low volume periods, while ATR-based risk management ensures consistent risk-reward profiles.

Combining Keltner Channel breakouts with Vortex indicator and volume confirmation filters out weak signals while the ATR-based risk management ensures consistent position sizing and prevents large drawdowns from volatile market moves.

Combining Keltner Channel breakout with Vortex and Volume Oscillator filters helps identify strong momentum moves while filtering out false breakouts in low-volume or range-bound conditions.
